name: Tarot Awakening
short_description: Rise beyond fortune-telling. In Tarot Awakening™ you're not just reading cards, you’re directing destiny. 🎭 Actors in a Tarot Drama awaits: assign cards to roles, train with spreads, flashcards and memory challenges in the ultimate test of intuition. Will you wield the deck or be lost in its pull?
detailed_description:
Rise beyond fortune-telling. Awaken the Oracle within.

In Tarot Awakening™, your journey is more than reading cards, it’s mastering destiny itself. You’re not just a seeker... you’re the director.

🎭 Every card is a character. Every scene, a choice - Director’s Mode
In Actors in a Tarot Drama, Step into dramatic life scenes and assign tarot cards to each character. Interpret betrayal, truth, passion, and consequence in a story-driven oracle experience. Every card is a character. Every scene, a mystery, you are the director.

Under the quiet pull of the moon, your journey deepens.

In the Moon Reflections room, log your thoughts, track your intuition, and align your inner world with the lunar cycle. Each phase offers a new prompt, an invitation to reflect, release, or renew.

🌑 New Moon: What do you wish to begin?

🌕 Full Moon: What truths have been revealed?

🌘 Waning Moon: What must you let go?

Other Features

  • Authentic Tarot Training: Master the Rider–Waite deck through guided spreads, intuitive reading exercises, and real-world layouts.

  • Memory & Intuition Challenges: Sharpen your mind with memory games, flip-to-reveal challenges, and symbolic associations.

  • Oracle Rank System: Rise from Wandering Novice to Supreme Oracle, your performance shapes your title.

  • Mystical Environments: Read in enchanted altars, unlock secret backgrounds, and feel the pull of sacred spaces.

  • Voice Guidance: Let immersive narration and subtle ambient sounds guide your journey.

  • Track Your Growth: Journal your insights, victories, and transformative moments along the way.

    Tarot Awakening™ isn’t just a game *** It’s a calling.
    Unlock the wisdom of the ancients. Challenge your mind. Trust your spirit. Inspired by the Rider–Waite tradition, this is the ultimate test of your intuition and mastery. Will you ascend to Oracle status or wander the mysteries forever?

The deck awaits you! 

⚠️ Note: Currently not compatible with Steam Deck. We are actively working to improve support and will update this section once Steam Deck play is verified.
